_comment: Bundled offline threat-intel snapshot. Ships with the app so detections work with zero network/keys. Optionally refreshed at runtime from abuse.ch (see app/core/threatintel.py refresh_from_feeds). The bundled malicious indicators below include those used by samples/generate_samples.py so the demo lights up out of the box.

ips.45.133.1.99: Known C2 — Cobalt Strike team server (bundled sample)
